category_sources: source_facts.description says CorsixTH is an open source clone of Theme Hospital; official README describes a reimplementation of the 1997 Theme Hospital business sim.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is corsixth; official repository and project README use CorsixTH.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki is referenced by the official README as the documentation starting point; README provides getting-started details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Theme Hospital clone; official README describes game reimplementation, modern OS support, and Lua/C++ codebase.
